{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324002608062C2102E02270A4EA16"}"},"total":188},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7376521832538424088","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"喜欢喜欢 真的好喜欢 笑笑好强 顾岁安好中二哈哈哈哈哈 好看真的好看！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1717484284,"group_id":"7322763111562218558","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"平安喜乐💜","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5kV1abr/ljwWxb9C21JNJfhfNvrvYDbAQ9qZC7YaB4y","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7c941f84e78d4a5d873348674881c67c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776876974&x-signature=%2FuBG5hjKe2MPEL87G6uvW7jANR4%3D","user_id":"2537318345872798","user_name":"璃呀璃"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2537318345872798","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7322763111562218558","book_info":{"abstract":"〖双男主，双洁，1v1，无女主，甜宠无虐，顶配玄学大师受VS人前高冷实则中二攻，灵异玄学〗
颜笑救个场没想到救到自己娃娃亲对象，看着眼前这浑身气运，金光闪闪的男人，颜大师表示，不要钱的气运，多薅一薅！
顾岁安对娃娃亲的态度，就是让对方知难而退！可是看到眼前的男人之后...颜大师，我有个贴身保镖的工作不知道颜大师感不感兴趣。
啪啪打脸的顾总：脸？那是什么？能吃吗？不能啊，但是我家笑笑我能吃啊！

digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":25029,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":43749,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1347},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7398888699604730648","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好看的，没有雷
明确写出来的就是把岛国要和华国玩心眼子结果被人打回去了，有伏笔但看得懂
当然有攻受的爱情故事，剧情上作者写的不是很深奥，交代的也清楚，有很多关于玄学的东西，三观正恩怨分明
后面感情现在也写的很好，攻在和受表明心意之后和在一起之后就非常非常粘人，恨不得拿一根绳子把笑笑拴在裤腰带上
